cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Sean could have gone to the bakery. The key here is to look at all the times Sean was seen doing other things and see when he was free. Also, the bakery is closed after 9pm, so whatever time he went must be before that. First, let me list out all the times Sean was accounted for: - 5am: Sean woke up. So he was at home then. - 5am to 6am: James saw Sean in class at school. So he was at school during that hour. - 6am to 8am: David saw Sean buying lunch at the deli. Wait, lunch? That seems a bit early, but okay, maybe it's a 24-hour deli. So Sean was at the deli from 6 to 8 am. - 8am to 9am: Betty saw Sean at the mall buying clothes.
